ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-29-2017 Continued To Sep-26-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Hamilton (Executor) in Propria Persona.

Mr. Hamilton stated that he wasn't able to do an Inventory and Appraisal, that the only things that are missing are the mineral rights for six mining companies, that three of them are in Counties (North Dakota, Texas) that require ancillaries, that only one has produced any profit and that the others produced zero. Mr. Hamilton also stated that he was told if he abandons them, they will revert to the State of California and that these interests are titled to Mr. Weaver. Status on filing of the Inventory and Appraisal is continued to September 26, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of said document in proper form. Mr. Hamilton is directed to keep in touch with the Probate Examiner.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: William Hamilton in Propria Persona.

The Court expressed concern about individuals serving as administrators of an Estate without the assistance of an Attorney, spoke of challenges and difficult issues that need to be addressed and encouraged Mr. Hamilton to have an Attorney. Mr. Hamilton explained his understanding of what the next steps are (dealing with Bank of America/unfreezing the account so that deposits can go through/opening an interest bearing account). Mr. Hamilton also stated that the Decedent has mineral rights/that the Decedent bought shares (basically investments with Energy Companies), that he has located a company that can appraise them, and that the Decedent has three Nephews who live in England and Malta. The Court informed Mr. Weaver that the mineral right shares need to be marshaled and appraised by the Probate Referee, that he needs an inventory and that he can not give money to anyone without having the Court's permission. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for August 29, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution is set for October 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Continued To Apr-25-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
